case_title: BEARDSLEY, CHARLES H. VS FOX, KATHERINE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $518.40 FILED BY BEARDSLEY, CHARLES H. AS TO DEFENDANT FOX, KATHERINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-30-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
